failure_reason: /release_memory_occupation endpoint returns 404 Not Found. SGLang-Omni's multi-stage pipeline (separate AR/codec/vocoder processes coordinated via IPC sockets) does not expose the snapshot memory release/resume endpoints that standard single-process SGLang servers provide.
methodology: Deployed with enable_memory_snapshot=True and experimental_options={enable_gpu_snapshot: True} on L4. Server started, health check passed, warmup request succeeded. POST /release_memory_occupation during snapshot-phase startup returned 404. Baseline cold start = L4 zero-shot cold start from U5 (290.3s).
